achievements.title: Har, Well Fought!
achievements.description: Kill Talbot in stage 5: "The Road to Chinon" and complete the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Ni!
achievements.description: Kill Slinker in stage 15: "Chalons and the Ruse" and complete the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Necromancer
achievements.description: Bring someone back from the dead using the cemetery
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Burning Rage
achievements.description: Use Burning Aura 10 times in a single stage and complete the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Strength Through Unity
achievements.description: Use Unified Guard 15 times in a single stage and complete the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: On a Mission From God
achievements.description: Have every possible armlet wielder transformed at the same time
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: The Altois Prairie
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "The Altois Prairie"
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Tower of Alsace
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Tower of Alsace"
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: My Name Is Gladiator
achievements.description: Complete all 10 rounds in "Free Combat" stage: "Colosseum 1"
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Shadows and Dust
achievements.description: Complete all 10 rounds in "Free Combat" stage: "Colosseum 2"
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: What We Do in Life Echoes in Eternity
achievements.description: Complete all 10 rounds in "Free Combat" stage: "Colosseum 3"
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Killer
achievements.description: Kill 3 enemies in a single turn
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Serial Killer
achievements.description: Kill 6 enemies in a single turn
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Born Killer
achievements.description: Kill 9 enemies in a single turn
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Heaven, Grant Me Power!
achievements.description: Have Jeanne transform 3 times in a single stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: The Creator's Armlet
achievements.description: Gather all 5 of the gems for Jeanne's armlet
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: I Am Strong, I Am Invincible, I Am Woman!
achievements.description: Complete any "Free Combat" stage with all possible female units only, with no weapon equipped, no transforming and with all units alive at the end of the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Minimalist
achievements.description: Complete a "Free Combat" stage without using any items
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Find 2 of the hidden treasures in any "Free Combat" stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Counter Attack!
achievements.description: Kill 8 enemies in any single stage, only during the "Enemy Phase"
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Come At Me, Bro
achievements.description: Complete a "Free Combat" stage in the post-game, while only killing enemies during the "Enemy Phase"
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: The Tank
achievements.description: Enter a "Free Combat" stage in the post-game with a unit (yours) that has 1000HP or more
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: The Chosen One
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, with only one unit
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Crack Shot
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, with only archers and with all of your units alive at the end of the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Keep Your Distance!
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, with only lancers and with all of your units alive at the end of the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: I Put a Spell on You...
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, with only spellcasters and with all of your units alive at the end of the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: 'Cause I'm the Axeman
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, with only axe users and with all of your units alive at the end of the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Live By the Sword...
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, with only swordsmen and with all of your units alive at the end of the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Slasher and Lasher
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, with only knife and_or whip users and with all of your units alive at the end of the stage
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Speed Battler
achievements.description: Complete the "Free Combat" stage: "Troyes", in the post-game, in 5 turns or less
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Coup De Grace
achievements.description: Obtain all possible coup de grace (red) Skill Stones
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: The Power Within
achievements.description: Obtain all possible innate (purple) Skill Stones
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Magus
achievements.description: Obtain all possible magic (green) Skill Stones
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Cuisses' Mysterious Power
achievements.description: Create 10 different skill stones through skill-binding
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: A Beacon of Knowledge
achievements.description: Create all skill stones possible through skill-binding
achievements.author: TeddyWestside
